result.summary: Found 4 Greip integration surfaces: 2 HTTP APIs (main authenticated Fraud Prevention API plus a public Free Get-IP endpoint), 1 public MCP server for docs, and 1 CLI with unclear auth mechanics; no GraphQL surface found.

greip_api_key.label: Greip API key
greip_api_key.setup: Create an account at [Greip Dashboard registration](https://dashboard.greip.io/register). Greip says a new account automatically generates an API key, and you can find it in the top-right corner of [the dashboard](https://dashboard.greip.io/home).
